Class Interpolation

java.lang.Object
fasttween.Interpolation
public final class Interpolation extends Object
Mathematical interpolation utilities.

Core math functions for tweening values. Pure Java implementation with zero JNI overhead - these calculations are so efficient that native code would only add call overhead.

Version:
1.0.0
Author:
FastJava Team

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static float
    clamp01(float value)
    Clamps a value to the range [0.0, 1.0].
    static double
    lerp(double start, double end, float t)
    Linear interpolation between two double values.
    static float
    lerp(float start, float end, float t)
    Linear interpolation between two float values.
    static int
    lerp(int start, int end, float t)
    Linear interpolation between two int values.
    static float
    smootherstep(float t)
    Smootherstep interpolation (6t⁵ - 15t⁴ + 10t³).
    static float
    smoothstep(float t)
    Smoothstep interpolation (3t² - 2t³).

  • Method Details

    • lerp

      public static float lerp(float start, float end, float t)
      Linear interpolation between two float values.
      Parameters:
      start - Starting value
      end - Ending value
      t - Interpolation factor [0.0, 1.0]
      Returns:
      Interpolated value

    • lerp

      public static double lerp(double start, double end, float t)
      Linear interpolation between two double values.
      Parameters:
      start - Starting value
      end - Ending value
      t - Interpolation factor [0.0, 1.0]
      Returns:
      Interpolated value

    • lerp

      public static int lerp(int start, int end, float t)
      Linear interpolation between two int values.
      Parameters:
      start - Starting value
      end - Ending value
      t - Interpolation factor [0.0, 1.0]
      Returns:
      Interpolated value (truncated)

    • clamp01

      public static float clamp01(float value)
      Clamps a value to the range [0.0, 1.0].
      Parameters:
      value - Value to clamp
      Returns:
      Clamped value

    • smoothstep

      public static float smoothstep(float t)
      Smoothstep interpolation (3t² - 2t³). Smooth acceleration and deceleration.
      Parameters:
      t - Input value [0.0, 1.0]
      Returns:
      Smoothed value

    • smootherstep

      public static float smootherstep(float t)
      Smootherstep interpolation (6t⁵ - 15t⁴ + 10t³). Even smoother acceleration and deceleration.
      Parameters:
      t - Input value [0.0, 1.0]
      Returns:
      Smoothed value
